Analysis: CDC Epi Info 7 Salmonella Outbreak Tutorial explicitly uses fictional outbreak data (CDC website); no real Salmonella outbreak with exactly these case numbers found in CDC/FDA databases; specific CSV files (CaseRegistry.csv, LabResults.csv) not mentioned in any Epi Info documentation; Windows setup scripts absent from Linux repo indicating this is example/tutorial data
task.json description and verifier.py reference to 'Epi Info 7' and 'Classic Analysis module'
task.json description: 'Both files share a common CaseID column'

privileged_info_summary: This is a synthetic Salmonella outbreak dataset with 55 cases used for teaching Epi Info 7 Classic Analysis. The task involves linking two CSV tables (CaseRegistry.csv and LabResults.csv) using CaseID as the common key. The expected lab result distribution shows 36 confirmed cases, 11 negative, and 8 pending (totaling 55 records). The dataset is fictional, modeled after CDC Epi Info tutorial scenarios for training epidemiologists on data relating and outbreak investigation workflows.
